title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nykaa - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Nykaa - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nykaa. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Chandigarh-based team.

About Nykaa:
Nykaa is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa!
